name: python3-hyperframe
title: python3-hyperframe
description:
Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 framing code
This module contains a pure-Python codebase that is capable of
decoding a binary stream into HTTP/2 frames.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-hyperframe because Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 framing code.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-hyperframe as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-hyperframe with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-hyperframe --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
